response.justification: Core competencies for this role are fullstack TS/Node + React delivery, AI-agent capability, cloud/containerization, database work, and testing discipline. The candidate evidences TS/Node/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK directly at Optilyz and ongoing fullstack work at re:cinq, satisfying the primary stack except for Nest.js which is not cited. AI-agent requirement is clearly met via MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq. Cloud/Docker/Kubernetes appears across GISCollective and Optilyz. Testing discipline is demonstrated through TDD at RIDE Capital and authored testing workshops/libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), though Vitest specifically is not named. Kotlin is absent (Java present). Experience volume (15+ years, multiple senior/staff roles) and architecture exposure exceed the bar.
